story.title: Startup founders urge U.S. government not to shut off Chinese open weight AI

draft:
I'm concerned about the potential consequences of shutting off Chinese open-source AI. 
As a developer, I rely on open-source tools to build and innovate. 
Restricting access could stifle progress and hinder collaboration.
Will limiting Chinese AI really protect US tech interests? 
#AI #opensource #techpolicy
